name: Zhejiang Jinggong Science & Technology Co., Ltd
summary: Zhejiang Jinggong Science & Technology Co., Ltd manufactures and sells solar photovoltaic equipment, carbon fiber composite materials and equipment, new building energy-saving equipment, textile equipment, and robot intelligence equipment. The company provides photovoltaic equipment, including polysilicon ingot furnaces and squarer's, and multi-wire slicing machines. It also offers building machinery comprising PU/mineral wool/PIR sandwich panel lines, double-deck high speed roll forming machines, fence board production lines, digital control folders, sandwich composite production lines, floor deck forming machines, high speed tile forming machines, roll forming machines, down pipe forming and curving pipe machines, purlin forming machines, and changeable automatic purlin forming machines. In addition, the company provides corrugated Web H-beam automatic welding lines, steel bar truss production lines, beam welding lines, box-shape column/beam welding lines, digital control drillers, section material benders, and shot blasting machines; and press curving machines, automatic seamers, slitting machines, filming covering and cutting machines, edge knurling machines, stacker cranes, and uncoilers. Further, it offers textile equipment, such as nylon machines, fancy and fiber twisters, rotor spinning machines, loose/tight winders, axial winders, spandex covered yarn machines, and metallic yarn covering machines; silver and air coated wires; and rubber coated wire lines. Additionally, the company provides precision processing and manufacturing machines for raw material preparation, material baiting, welding, machining, inspection, preassembly, and packaging and transport; and other high-tech products. Zhejiang Jinggong Science & Technology Co., Ltd is based in Shaoxing, China.
